author: lOrm
content: Closing as tracked-future-roadmap-not-active-bug. Phase 1 of #345 landed (worktree.rs no longer mutates process CWD on any path; 5 forensic tests including compile-time anti-regression grep). Phase 2 (thread worktree path through ToolContext, WorktreeGuard/Drop, ChatSession.active_worktree) is a forward-looking refactor — the CWD-mutation safety hazard is already fixed at the source. Re-file when the Phase 2 scope is actively ready to start.
